subcodes.first_line: O Ali! The world is perfumed with the fragrance of divine utterance, and in utmost rapture and fervor is occupied with glorification and praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی عالم از عرف بیان الهی معطر و بکمال ذوق و شوق بتسبیح و تهلیل مشغول از
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @imagery in the Qur'an, @praise and encouragement
